html:
Exclusive to:

Flash Freeze Staff can be crafted at level 1 of the Combriner. It functions similarly to the Ice Staff, freezing its target; however, each hit of the Flash Freeze Staff is equivalent to two hits of the Ice Staff. Each use reduces the user’s Sanity by 1 and consumes 5% durability, allowing for a total of 20 uses.

When used, it temporarily freezes a Mob. Frozen creatures that periodically drop items (such as Beefalo producing Manure) will continue to drop those items while frozen.

Like the Ice Staff, the Flash Freeze Staff can be used to extinguish smoldering or burning objects.

Contents

  • 1 Usage
  • 2 Deep Freeze Staff
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Usage

Deep Freeze Staff

Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

Deep Freeze Staff can be crafted at level 2 of the Combriner. It functions similarly to the Ice Staff, freezing its target, but each hit of the Deep Freeze Staff is equivalent to three hits of the Ice Staff. Each use reduces the user’s Sanity by 1 and consumes 5% durability, allowing for a total of 20 uses.

When used, it temporarily freezes a Mob. Frozen creatures that periodically drop items (such as Beefalo producing Manure) will continue to drop those items while frozen.

Like the Ice Staff, the Deep Freeze Staff can be used to extinguish smoldering or burning objects.

Assets

  • Flash Freeze Staff Equipped
  • Deep Freeze Staff Equipped

Gallery

  • Flash Freeze Staff concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Exclusive to:
“It comes with a freeze upgrade!”
–Wilson
“I prefer the opposite of this.”
–Willow
“Little Wolfgang loved icy pops.”
–Wolfgang
“Cold and misery.”
–Wendy
“TIME FOR SOME FROZEN MEATSACKS”
–WX-78
“A magically-attuned chilling implement.”
–Wickerbottom
“Might need mitts for this.”
–Woodie
“Want to see a cool trick? I just need a volunteer...”
–Maxwell
“Jötunn magics!”
–Wigfrid
“Ms. Wickerbottom says we should be careful with magic.”
–Webber
“Prepare for a frosting!”
–Warly
“Chilly-chilly stick!”
–Wormwood
“Like frostbite on a stick.”
–Winona
“I'll be the sub-zero hero!”
–Wortox
“Can't lick magic icy stick? Florp.”
–Wurt
“Pretty cool, huh?”
–Walter
“I could dabble in some ice magic.”
–Wanda

Each use reduces the user’s Sanity by 1 and consumes 5% durability, allowing for a total of 20 uses.

“Even more powerful, icy.”
–Wilson
“Seriously?”
–Willow
“Wow, is giant icy pop.”
–Wolfgang
“My heart is already cold as ice.”
–Wendy
“FREEZE THEM ALL”
–WX-78
“It gives off a powerful chill.”
–Wickerbottom
“We'll send them straight to the Yukon with this.”
–Woodie
“I'll show you a chilling display of magic.”
–Maxwell
“A staff wörthy öf Skadi herself.”
–Wigfrid
“It makes our teeth chatter!”
–Webber
“A portable freezer!”
–Warly
“Chilly-chilly-chilly stick!”
–Wormwood
“It'll freeze 'em in their tracks.”
–Winona
“Behold, I wield the cold!”
–Wortox
“But looks so yummy! Florp!”
–Wurt
“Have an ice day! Heh...”
–Walter
“I'll need a hot cup of tea after this.”
–Wanda

Each use reduces the user’s Sanity by 1 and consumes 5% durability, allowing for a total of 20 uses.

'''Flash Freeze Staff''' can be crafted at level 1 of the [[Combriner]]. It functions similarly to the {{DSTL|Ice Staff}}, freezing its target; however, each hit of the Flash Freeze Staff is equivalent to two hits of the Ice Staff. Each use reduces the user’s [[Sanity]] by 1 and consumes 5% durability, allowing for a total of 20 uses.

When used, it temporarily freezes a [[Mob]]. Frozen creatures that periodically drop items (such as {{DSTL|Beefalo}} producing {{DSTL|Manure}}) will continue to drop those items while frozen.

Like the Ice Staff, the Flash Freeze Staff can be used to extinguish smoldering or burning objects.
